name: Spinach Salad Orientale
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dressing ingredients together first and refrigerate.
2. Combine the spinach, water chestnuts, chopped hard-boiled eggs, bean sprouts, and crumbled bacon in a large bowl.
3. Just before serving, pour the prepared dressing over the salad and toss gently until well combined.
4. Serve immediately.
